function_execution_id.desc: Context identifier that maps to the executed function

outputs.desc: A JSON-based object that conforms to the output parameters schema for the custom function defined in the manifest

desc: Signal the successful completion of a function

errors.execution_not_in_running_state: The function execution is no longer in a state to be completed.
errors.function_execution_not_found: The specified function execution cannot be found.
errors.parameter_validation_failed: There were problems when validating the outputs against the Function parameters. See API response for more details.
